f3c0b9c6-7377-4ba1-aa5b-d29c45d075dd.job_description:
Job Title: Junior Frontend Developer

Location: Hybrid — NYC / Remote

About the Role:

We are looking for a motivated Junior Frontend Developer to join our fast-growing product team. You’ll collaborate with designers, backend developers, and product managers to build clean, responsive user interfaces for our web applications.

Responsibilities:
Build and maintain web pages using React.js, HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.
Collaborate with the UI/UX team to translate designs into functional code.
Optimize applications for maximum speed and scalability.
Participate in code reviews and contribute to team knowledge-sharing.
Troubleshoot and debug issues across browsers and devices.

Requirements:
Basic understanding of JavaScript frameworks (preferably React or Vue).
Strong skills in HTML5, CSS3, and responsive design principles.
Familiarity with REST APIs and JSON.
Knowledge of version control (Git).
Strong problem-solving skills and willingness to learn.

d4fb38a0-f7e9-4386-812a-b7f23d79bfe7.job_description:
Job Title: Junior Frontend Developer

Location: Hybrid — NYC / Remote

About the Role:

We are looking for a motivated Junior Frontend Developer to join our fast-growing product team. You’ll collaborate with designers, backend developers, and product managers to build clean, responsive user interfaces for our web applications.

Responsibilities:
Build and maintain web pages using React.js, HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.
Collaborate with the UI/UX team to translate designs into functional code.
Optimize applications for maximum speed and scalability.
Participate in code reviews and contribute to team knowledge-sharing.
Troubleshoot and debug issues across browsers and devices.

Requirements:
Basic understanding of JavaScript frameworks (preferably React or Vue).
Strong skills in HTML5, CSS3, and responsive design principles.
Familiarity with REST APIs and JSON.
Knowledge of version control (Git).
Strong problem-solving skills and willingness to learn.
